# Jami route map

Jami is an authenticated study workspace. Start at / and sign in with Google or
email. Dashboard pages load the signed-in user's Firebase data; do not assume a
signed-out visitor can access seeded or public dashboard data.

Primary destinations:
- /dashboard - Home and recommended next action
- /dashboard/study - Learn and flashcard review
- /dashboard/practise - Folders and notebook-first study spaces
- /dashboard/progress - Progress and weak areas
- /dashboard/decks - Flashcard decks
- /dashboard/cards - All flashcards
- /dashboard/topics - Connected study topics
- /dashboard/library - Saved sources and existing source tools
- /dashboard/goals - Scoped study goals
- /dashboard/constellation - Stars and constellation rewards
- /dashboard/profile - Account and profile settings

Additional routes:
- /dashboard/folders/[folderId] - A folder's notebooks, decks, topics, and sources
- /dashboard/notebooks/[notebookId] - Page-based notebook editor
- /dashboard/decks/[id] - Deck detail and card management
- /dashboard/decks/[id]/study - Deck study session
- /dashboard/topics/[topicId] - Topic detail

Compatibility:
- /dashboard/practice redirects to /dashboard/practise
- User-facing copy says Folders or Practice even though the legacy `practise` path
  is retained for route compatibility.

Data and privacy:
- Persistent dashboard actions require Firebase authentication.
- Notebook PDF rendering and page counting happen client-side where supported.
- Saved sources are only sent to the existing source Tutor after the user selects
  them and asks a question.
- Do not infer OCR, background source indexing, browser monitoring, or a public
  demo workspace.
